title: goeppertia cleistantha
intro: Goeppertia cleistantha, also known as the Calathea cleistantha, is a species of plant in the family Marantaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Goeppertia cleistantha can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
